title: refactor network commands
body:
move core of network commands from pkg/adapter to pkg/network to assist
with api development and remote podman commands.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *baude* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [baude] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
this is blocking apiv2 work.  please review and merge
@baude I mean, it is Sunday of shutdown :smile:

Ack. LGTM then.

On Mon, Dec 30, 2019, 12:23 Brent Baude <notifications@github.com> wrote:

> *@baude* commented on this pull request.
> ------------------------------
>
> In pkg/network/network.go
> <https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/4757#discussion_r362046174>:
>
> > +		return errors.Wrapf(err, "failed to get live network names")
> +	}
> +	if util.StringInSlice(interfaceName, liveNetworkNames) {
> +		if err := RemoveInterface(interfaceName); err != nil {
> +			return errors.Wrapf(err, "failed to delete the network interface %q", interfaceName)
> +		}
> +	}
> +	// Remove the configuration file
> +	if err := os.Remove(cniPath); err != nil {
> +		return errors.Wrapf(err, "failed to remove network configuration file %q", cniPath)
> +	}
> +	return nil
> +}
> +
> +// InspectNetwork reads a CNI config and returns its configuration
> +func InspectNetwork(name string) (map[string]interface{}, error) {
>
> It is really too loosely defined to do much more. I don't like it either.
>
